ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Continued To Nov-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator James Howard Walkenhurst to appear on November 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to November 10, 2021. If either petition is filed by November 1, 2021, no appearance is required on that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-10-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Continued To Mar-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; James Walkenhurst appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.
John Walkenhurst (Son of James) also present by zoom.

Mr. Walkenhurst stated that his Wife has been requiring full time care in the last couple of months and that he dropped the ball. The Court informed Mr. Walkenhurst that an inventory and appraisal is needed. John stated that they sent the paper work to the people's choice on January 18th, that the people's choice sent them a declaration indicating that a Probate Referee is not required because it's all cash, that he will have his Father sign the form today and re-send to the people's choice, and that he will be sure to follow up with them. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to March 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the inventory and appraisal is filed by March 3rd, no appearance is required on March 10th. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Continued To Feb-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner James H. Walkenhurst to appear on February 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
